calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Mark D. Hudak, Esq. appeared for plaintiff WSM Enterprises, Inc., dba On-Site Contracting, a California corporation.
Vincent Sebastiano, Project Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Trophy Properties Marina, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 21, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff WSM Enterprises, Inc., dba On-Site Contracting, a California corporation, and against defendant Trophy Properties Marina, LLC, a California limited liability company as follows:

Principal - $108,260.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,161.00.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $120,421.00.

Additionally, the sum of $120,321.00 is adjudged a lien on the real property and improvements commonly known as 2455 Polk Street, City and County of San Francisco. Said lien shall be foreclosed, and the property sold to satisfy the lien.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-12-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Continued To Dec-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
